full_text:
Fu Xuan 傅玄
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Xuan (傅玄). Wrote the Fuzi and helped compile Wei’s history, a famed poet in his day. Fu Xuan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Fu Xuan lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
